D:\software\cmake-4.3.1-windows-x86_64\bin\cmake.exe -E rm -f CMakeFiles\contact_management_system.dir/objects.a
D:\software\mingw64\bin\ar.exe qc CMakeFiles\contact_management_system.dir/objects.a @CMakeFiles\contact_management_system.dir\objects1.rsp
D:\software\mingw64\bin\g++.exe -g -Wl,--whole-archive CMakeFiles\contact_management_system.dir/objects.a -Wl,--no-whole-archive -o D:\code\vscode\contact_management_system\bin\contact_management_system.exe -Wl,--out-implib,libcontact_management_system.dll.a -Wl,--major-image-version,0,--minor-image-version,0 @CMakeFiles\contact_management_system.dir\linkLibs.rsp
